# GitHub Copilot — movie-finder-docs

MkDocs documentation site, PlantUML architecture diagrams, Structurizr C4 model, and ADRs for Movie Finder.

> For full project context, persona prompts, and architecture reference: see root `.github/copilot-instructions.md`.

---

## Authoring standards

- Edit `.puml` source files only — PNGs are generated at build time and gitignored
- **Never generate `.mdj` StarUML files programmatically** — the format requires explicit pixel coordinates; user syncs from `.puml` to StarUML manually for stakeholder reviews
- Render the full site with `make mkdocs` from the repo root (handles PlantUML automatically)
- VSCode live preview per file: `Option+D` / `Alt+D` with `jebbs.plantuml`
- Update `workspace.dsl` whenever a container, component, or inter-system relation changes
- `workspace.json` is gitignored — regenerated by Structurizr Lite

---

## Design patterns

| Artefact    | Rule                                                                                                                 |
| ----------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **ADR**     | Write one for: new external dep, tech stack change, new project-wide pattern, security/auth change, API contract decision. Use the template in `architecture/decisions/index.md`. Status: `Proposed` → `Accepted`. |
| **PlantUML** | One file per diagram (numbered `01`–`10`). Update the matching `.puml` for every architectural change. Never edit generated PNGs. |
| **Structurizr** | `workspace.dsl` is the canonical C4 source. Update L1–L3 views and the deployment diagram when structure changes. |

---

## Key files

| Path                               | Description                                           |
| ---------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------- |
| `architecture/plantuml/`           | Canonical PlantUML source files (`01`–`10`)           |
| `architecture/workspace.dsl`       | Structurizr C4 model (L1–L3 + deployment views)       |
| `architecture/decisions/`          | ADRs — index + template in `index.md`                 |
| `mkdocs.yml`                       | MkDocs site configuration                             |
| `scripts/prepare-docs.sh`          | Copies submodule READMEs and renders PNGs at build time |
